name: unknown-pinned-service
description: Repo with no recognizable manifest, pinned to 'service' via .agents/readiness/config.json — exercises detection pinning end-to-end; README is substantive so docs.readme passes while api_schema_docs fails (no framework, no schema).

files.README.md:
# Telemetry relay

A service that fans telemetry events out to downstream consumers.

## Running

```bash
./run.sh
```

## Protocol

Events arrive as newline-delimited JSON on stdin and are re-published to each configured
sink with at-least-once semantics. Sinks are declared in `sinks.conf`; failures are retried
with exponential backoff and surfaced on stderr.

## Operations

The relay is stateless; restart at will. Backpressure is applied upstream when any sink
falls behind by more than the configured window.
